docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,736.30 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT FLOWERS, DAHRELL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-09-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $115.00 SERVED MAY-05-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FLOWERS, DAHRELL

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAHRELL FLOWERS IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
